data.venue_city: Rua Professor Fernando da Fonseca, Lisboa
data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: Clear favorite. Data consistently indicates Sporting CP dominance.
REASON: Sporting CP's xG (2.24) and PPG (2.43) strongly predict multiple goals. Tondela's low xG (1.03) and PPG (0.79) suggest minimal offensive threat and defensive vulnerability. High O2.5 potential (72%) aligns with Sporting scoring at least two goals.
CONCLUSION: Home Team +1.5 Over Goals.
